authority_declaration.scope: Evidence-synthesized executive narrative. All interpretive content traces to governed spine objects, checkpoint state, or structural evidence.
authority_declaration.grounding_requirement: Every narrative claim must reference at least one spine object, checkpoint, or evidence artifact

absolute_prohibitions.prohibition: No team behavior, organizational intent, or human motive inference
No cultural diagnosis, leadership quality, or management effectiveness assessment
No personnel attribution, behavioral prediction, or organizational sentiment
No remediation prioritization, 'you should' language, or ranked next actions
No fabricated narrative — all prose must trace to governance events, proof objects, or evidence artifacts
No simulation of organizational psychology or decision-making process
No marketplace, module, agentic, or Cortex claims
No S3 advancement claims or projection
No genesis layer claims — chronicle corridor is post-genesis semantic replay only
No universality overclaim — 2 specimens support comparison, not pattern
No convergence unification — diversity within common laws is the proof, not forced uniformity
No authority ceiling bypass — L3 maximum for AI-derived narrative synthesis

chapter_authority_map.ch01_emergence: Structural evidence from checkpoint_00_baseline state capture
chapter_authority_map.ch02_formation: Proposition derivation artifacts — SDC output and bridge transformation
chapter_authority_map.ch03_tension: Governance proof capsule — review_event_log.jsonl and review_summary.json
chapter_authority_map.ch04_strengthening: Enrichment log and debt evolution — evidence-driven uplift and honest limitation
chapter_authority_map.ch06_qualification: Promotion state transition record — S2_BRIDGE → S2_GOVERNED
chapter_authority_map.ch07_convergence: Convergence observations — 7 observations, 15-dimension matrix, DESCRIPTIVE maturity
chapter_authority_map.ch08_projection: Meta-narrative — the chronicle itself as proof of communicable cognition
